# tokenmath

> Accurate token math for Claude, Gemini, and OpenAI. 100% client-side.

## Calculators

- [Claude 4.5 Sonnet](https://tokenmath.dev/token-calculator/anthropic-claude-4-5-sonnet): tokens + USD cost
- [Claude 4.5 Haiku](https://tokenmath.dev/token-calculator/anthropic-claude-4-5-haiku): tokens + USD cost
- [Claude 4.7 Opus](https://tokenmath.dev/token-calculator/anthropic-claude-4-7-opus): tokens + USD cost
- [Gemini 2.5 Pro](https://tokenmath.dev/token-calculator/google-gemini-2-5-pro): tokens + USD cost
- [Gemini 2.5 Flash](https://tokenmath.dev/token-calculator/google-gemini-2-5-flash): tokens + USD cost
- [GPT-5](https://tokenmath.dev/token-calculator/openai-gpt-5): tokens + USD cost
- [GPT-5 Mini](https://tokenmath.dev/token-calculator/openai-gpt-5-mini): tokens + USD cost
- [GPT-5 Nano](https://tokenmath.dev/token-calculator/openai-gpt-5-nano): tokens + USD cost
- [GPT-4.1](https://tokenmath.dev/token-calculator/openai-gpt-4-1): tokens + USD cost
- [GPT-4.1 Mini](https://tokenmath.dev/token-calculator/openai-gpt-4-1-mini): tokens + USD cost
- [GPT-4o](https://tokenmath.dev/token-calculator/openai-gpt-4o): tokens + USD cost
- [GPT-4o mini](https://tokenmath.dev/token-calculator/openai-gpt-4o-mini): tokens + USD cost

## Features

- [Home calculator](https://tokenmath.dev/): paste a prompt, see token count + USD cost. Compare mode tokenizes against every supported model in one tap.
- [Models index](https://tokenmath.dev/models): every supported model with vendor filters, sort controls, and multi-select side-by-side comparison.
- [Compare models](https://tokenmath.dev/compare): side-by-side cost comparison for any two models — input/output price, context window, accuracy, and what a real request costs on each.
- [Platform costs](https://tokenmath.dev/cost): how AI coding tools (Cursor, Replit, Copilot, …) bill, and how their credits/tokens map to real model cost.
- [Pricing data](https://tokenmath.dev/pricing-data): every rate dated and linked to the vendor's public pricing page.
- [Changelog](https://tokenmath.dev/changelog): what shipped and when.

## Platform costs

How popular AI coding tools bill, and how their credits/tokens map to real model cost.

- [Cursor](https://tokenmath.dev/cost/cursor): An AI-first code editor that meters frontier-model use against a dollar-denominated usage pool.
- [GitHub Copilot](https://tokenmath.dev/cost/github-copilot): The pair-programmer that moved to usage-based AI Credits (1 credit = $0.01) in June 2026.
- [Claude Code](https://tokenmath.dev/cost/claude-code): Anthropic’s terminal coding agent — pay a flat Claude subscription or raw API tokens.
- [Replit](https://tokenmath.dev/cost/replit): Cloud IDE whose Agent bills by “effort” — you pay for the work it performs, success or not.
- [Bolt.new](https://tokenmath.dev/cost/bolt): Browser-based full-stack app builder that meters standard LLM tokens, not abstract credits.
- [v0 (Vercel)](https://tokenmath.dev/cost/v0): Vercel’s generative-UI tool, now metered on input/output tokens converted to dollar credits.
- [Lovable](https://tokenmath.dev/cost/lovable): Prompt-to-app builder metered in credits, with a separate usage bill for the apps you ship.
- [Windsurf (now Devin Desktop)](https://tokenmath.dev/cost/windsurf): Codeium’s Windsurf editor was acquired by Cognition and rebranded Devin Desktop — its pricing now mirrors Devin’s token-quota model.
